final_answer:
The daily 'timeseries.ingestion.dataset.recordsuccess.count' values between '2026-03-15' and '2026-03-31' are as follows:

- 2026-03-29: 18 records
- 2026-03-30: 6 records

No other days within the specified range had successful records.
